name: opcua-mcp
description: Exposes OPC UA Part 4 service calls as MCP tools, enabling AI assistants to connect to OPC UA servers, browse address spaces, read/write values, call methods, manage subscriptions, and more. The tool catalog is profile-based (core/services/administration/pubsub/diagnostics/full); the default 'full' profile registers every tool, while bounded profiles expose only the subset relevant to that workflow.
